title: Adventure Time Origins
description: Origins themed around the races featured in the cartoon Adventure Time!
body:
Adds Origins based on species from Adventure Time.
Currently added origins:
- Flame Person
- Candy Person
- Vampire
- Hexapodian (Loosely inspired by The Scarab)

Potentially planned origins:
- Demon
- Shapeshifter (Like Jake or his alien parent)
- Slime Person
- Lumpy Space Person
- Rainicorn
- Hyooman (The fish mutants)
- A couple of varieties of animal people?
- A way to make hybrids of two species?
